Bug Title: Registration success with invalid email format
Description: User can register using email without proper domain (e.g. abc@com)
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to Register 2. Enter email: abc@com 3. Click Register

Bug Title: No error message on wrong password
Description: Clicking Login with wrong password shows blank screen instead of error
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Enter correct email 2. Enter wrong password 3. Click Login
Actual Result: Blank screen appears for 3 seconds then redirects

Description: User can add more quantity than available stock
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open product with stock_qty=2 2. Change cart quantity to 10 3. Click Update

Bug Title: Cart does not persist after logout and login
Description: Items added to cart disappear after user logs out and logs back in
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Add 2 items to cart 2. Logout 3. Login again 4. Open cart
Expected Result: Previously added items visible in cart

Description: Error message for invalid coupon does not tell user what went wrong
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Enter coupon code: TESTXYZ 2. Click Apply
Expected Result: Error: Invalid or expired coupon code

Bug Title: COD option not available for orders above 5000
Description: COD payment method disappears for orders above Rs 5000 without any message
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Add items totaling Rs 6000 2. Proceed to checkout 3. Check payment methods
Expected Result: COD available with note: COD not available above Rs 5000

Bug Title: Cancelled order still shows as Processing
Description: After cancellation order status remains Processing in order history
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Place order 2. Cancel order 3. Go to order history

Bug Title: Out of stock product allows Add to Cart click
Description: Add to Cart button is visible but should be disabled for OOS products
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open out-of-stock product 2. Click Add to Cart
Expected Result: Button disabled and shows Out of Stock
Actual Result: Button clickable and item added to cart

Bug Title: Product images broken on search results page
Description: Product images fail to load on the search results listing page
Password is changed without confirming the new password matches
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to Change Password 2. Enter old password 3. Enter new password 4. Leave confirm field blank 5. Save
Actual Result: Password changed with blank confirm field

Bug Title: Coupon discount not reflected in final order amount
Description: Discount applied at checkout is not reflected in the placed order total
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Apply coupon SAVE10 2. Verify discount 3. Place order 4. Check order total in My Orders
Actual Result: Order total shows original price without discount

Description: Registration form mobile field does not validate numeric-only input
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to Register 2. Enter mobile: abcdefghij 3. Click Register
Actual Result: Registration allowed with alphabetic mobile number

Description: Applied filters are lost when the page is refreshed
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Apply Electronics category filter 2. Refresh page

Bug Title: Mobile view - checkout button cut off
Description: Proceed to Checkout button is partially hidden on 375px mobile view
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open cart on mobile (375px) 2. Scroll to bottom

Bug Title: No message when order list is empty
Description: New users with no orders see blank page instead of helpful message
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Register new account 2. Go to My Orders
Expected Result: Message: You have no orders yet

Bug Title: Session does not expire after inactivity
Description: User session remains active even after 60+ minutes of inactivity
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Login 2. Leave browser idle for 90 minutes 3. Perform action
Actual Result: User still logged in without re-authentication

Description: User can enter negative quantity in cart update field
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open cart 2. Change quantity to -2 3. Click Update
Expected Result: Error: Quantity must be greater than 0
Actual Result: Cart updated with -2 quantity and total shows negative

Bug Title: Order placed without selecting delivery address
Description: System allows checkout without selecting a delivery address
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Add items to cart 2. Skip address step 3. Select payment 4. Place order
Expected Result: Error: Please select a delivery address
Actual Result: Order placed and shows address as blank

Bug Title: Sorting not working on product listing page
Description: Price sorting (Low to High) does not reorder products correctly
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open product listing 2. Select Sort: Price Low to High
Expected Result: Products sorted in ascending price order
Actual Result: Products remain in original random order
